name: remove_a_remote_file
description: Removes the slack reference to an external file (which must have been previously added via the remote files api), specified by either its `external id` or `file` id (one of which is required), without deleting the actual external file.

external_id.description:
Creator-defined, globally unique ID (GUID) for the file.
Examples:
  "my-unique-file-guid-12345"
  "doc-abc-external-id"
